title: André Is an Idiot
overview: André, a brilliant idiot, is dying because he didn’t get a colonoscopy. His sobering diagnosis, complete irreverence, and insatiable curiosity, send him on an unexpected journey learning how to die happily and ridiculously without losing his sense of humor.

title: Cheer Dad
overview: When a young girl and her family move to a new town, she yearns for a sense of belonging. She finds it by joining her school's cheerleading squad. Inspired by her new found love and dedication to the sport, her adoptive father comes out for support and is soon recruited as the assistant coach. As the father and daughter grow together, they'll see if they have what it takes to win the championship.

title: Tokyo Burst: Crime City
overview: Rookie detective Aiba, a native of Tokyo's red-light district (with all the attitude and methods that entails), must team up with Cho, a counterpart from Seoul with equally questionable practices, to track down a dangerous criminal spreading terror across Japan, Korea, and the Philippines. While the relationship between the two investigators is frosty at first, they'll have to learn to work together quickly in the face of such a formidable adversary.

title: Fallen Angels
overview: Two upper-class wives, their husbands away for the day, share a few toasts to their pre-marital dalliances—with the same man, who just may be en route from France to visit. Old rivalries and past scandals bubble to the surface in this intoxicating romp from one of theatre’s comedy masters.

title: Fuori
overview: Rome. The 1980s. After the magnum opus The Art of Joy she has been working on for a decade is rejected by the Italian publishing world, writer Goliarda Sapienza commits a desperate theft that costs her her reputation and social position. Incarcerated in Italy’s largest female prison, she finds herself living alongside thieves, junkies, sex workers and revolutionaries. After her release, she continues to meet with these women and over the course of a sweltering summer, a life-changing relationship flowers – a relationship that will reawaken her the desire to live and to write.

title: Dao
overview: A family weaves the threads of a heritage that travels between worlds. Joy and pain, memory and transmission. A wedding in France, a commemorative ceremony in Guinea-Bissau. Two celebrations, organically intertwined through bodies and time, leading to a rebirth.

title: Un dîner pas si parfait
overview: A family meal, political discussions, tears, shouts, a grandmother dying, a detective doing his detective work, and maybe a murderer to catch...

title: Stranger Than Paradise
overview: New York layabout Willie forms an unexpected bond with his young Hungarian cousin Eva when she pays him a surprise visit. Later, Eva moves in with their aunt in Cleveland, and Willie takes his best friend Eddie to see her—a visit that culminates in a strange, eventful trip to Florida.

title: Kill the Clue
overview: A party takes a mysterious turn when a guest is found dead!

title: The Exhibitor
overview: As murders begin to surface around hotels and expos, suspicion around Vi begins to close in. With her past resurfacing and her behavior growing harder to read, one question lingers: What is she really hiding?

title: Alive
overview: After coming face to face with death, 40-year-old Nora is consumed by an urgent need to feel alive. She dives into passionate relationships with two very different men, Tom and Max, whose opposing natures reflect her own inner conflict. But when neither can fill the void, Nora is forced to face the truth, she will have to confront a deeper fear driving her hunger for life.

title: Achilles Returns
overview: After many years, with help of Thetis and negotiations between Zeus and Hades, an aged Achilles is released from the Underworld into a modern world.

title: Madonna & Graham
overview: Graham Norton sits down with the 'Queen of Pop', singer-songwriter, record producer, actress, entrepreneur, charity founder and LGBT rights and gender equality activist Madonna. The pair discuss her lengthy career in which she has achieved 18 multi-platinum albums globally, seven Grammy Awards, two Golden Globe Awards, twenty MTV Video Music Awards and an induction to the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame.

title: Susana and Elvira: No Plan B
original_title: Susana y Elvira: Sin plan B
overview: Susana and Elvira, two former best friends, reunite after two years apart to organize the celebrity wedding of the year.

title: Triumph of the Heart
overview: The extraordinary true story of St. Maximilian Kolbe, a Polish Catholic priest who volunteered to die in place of another man in Auschwitz during World War II.

title: Strawberry Fields Forever
original_title: Un champ de fraises pour l’éternité
overview: The year-round residents in a lakeside campsite have to leave because of a sale.

title: Rik Mayall: Magnificent B'stard
overview: From early sketches to standout performances, Mayall's fearless comedy bursts with energy and intent, capturing a pivotal moment in British comedy while delivering pure entertainment.

title: Sukkwan Island
overview: In an effort to reconnect with his estranged father, 13-year-old Roy agrees to spend a formative year of adventure on the remote Sukkwan Island deep in the Norwegian fjords. What starts as a chance to rebuild their relationship quickly descends into a test of survival as they face the harsh realities of their environment and confront their unresolved turmoil.

title: Beyond the Infinite Two Minutes
original_title: ドロステのはてで僕ら
overview: A cafe owner discovers that the TV in his cafe suddenly shows images from the future, but only two minutes into the future.

title: The Sloth Lane
overview: After a terrifying storm destroys their home, a speedy sloth named Laura and her kooky family move to the big city in their rusted old food truck, Gordito, hoping to make their business a success. The family's delicious food catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah who will stop at nothing to revive her failing fast-food business.

title: The Leader
overview: In 1997, thirty-nine members of the American cult known as "Heaven's Gate" committed the largest mass suicide to ever take place on American soil. This is their story.

title: Crescendo
overview: Behind the scenes of an ambitious staging of the opera The Marriage of Figaro, an accusation of sexual assault emerges, upsetting the balance of the cast. The film explores the tensions linked to generational conflicts and individual stances, in an artistic context in crisis.

title: PASTIS
overview: Sasha, 20, returns to her family’s sun-soaked home in the south of France with her friends—her first visit since her older sister’s death. What begins as an idyllic summer escape slowly curdles into something far more suffocating.

title: Eyes I
overview: A set of eyes of several women.

title: I Understand Your Displeasure
overview: Heike works at a cleaning company, where every day she has to handle her team’s struggles, the pressure of delivering a spotless job, and the need to keep clients and boss happy. When a powerful subcontractor threatens to withdraw his support if she does not provide more work for his team, Heike faces a difficult choice. To comply, she must sacrifice one of her own employees. As the pressure closes in, Heike must decide how far she is willing to go to meet the job’s ruthless demands.

title: Swechha Teeram
overview: A young man's plan to impress his girlfriend's father takes a comic turn when their meeting turns into a challenge that could decide the future of their love.

title: The Founder5 II: Unfinished Business
overview: Grander, bolder and sharper, the Founder5 returns to the stage with other talented comedians for more standup, improv and sketch comedy.

title: The VelociPastor 2
overview: The perfect movie DOES exist! Doug and Carol travel to the port city of Milan, where they have to solve a series of murders committed by a masked slasher at an Italian Fertility Festival. And Soviet Spies. INTERPOL’s there, too.

title: A Mosquito in the Ear
overview: Andrew and Daniela travel to Goa, India, to meet their newly adopted 4-year-old daughter, Sarvari, and bring her back to the US. However, their world begins to crumble when Sarvari refuses to leave the orphanage that she calls home behind. The couple’s attempts to welcome their child into her new family and travel back with her prove to be a chaotic challenge that not only tests their patience but also profoundly reshapes their ideas of family, parenthood, and their relationship as a couple.

title: AEW Double or Nothing 2026
overview: The 2026 Double or Nothing was a professional wrestling pay-per-view produced by All Elite Wrestling (AEW) that took place on May 24, 2026, at Louis Armstrong Stadium in New York City, New York, USA. It featured the first quarter-final matches of the 2026 Owen Hart Foundation Tournaments for both the men and women, as well as the long-anticipated AEW International Championship match between Don Callis Family members Kazuchika Okada (c) and Konosuke Takeshita. The show was headlined by Darby Allin (c) vs. MJF in a Title vs. Hair match for the AEW World Championship, where MJF would have to shave his head bald if he lost.

title: Killing Castro
overview: Centered on true events when Cuban revolution leader Fidel Castro visited New York City and stayed in Harlem in 1960.

title: Eclosión
overview: In a forgotten laboratory, a brilliant but obsessed inventor brings to life his most promising creation: the Hatchling. Fragile yet full of promise, the creature becomes the focus of both care and experimentation. As the line between legacy and control begins to blur, Eclosión explores the price of perfection and whether love can survive obsession.

title: Billions Club Live with Olivia Rodrigo: A Concert Film
original_title: Billions Club Live with Olivia Rodrigo: A Concert Film
overview: Live from Barcelona, Olivia Rodrigo takes her top fans on an emotional ride through her biggest songs during a one-night-only Billions Club Live concert. From her Billions Club hits to her new single "drop dead," along with a few fan favorites, it all unravels in one unforgettable live performance.

title: Abuela tremenda
overview: Toñi, an eccentric grandmother, gets by between failed businesses and a carefree attitude. Her daughter Daniela, a stressed executive and single mom, wants to keep her away.

title: Treat Her Like a Lady
overview: When single mother Sandra, full of unwavering energy, is evicted from her apartment by the Dutch government due to fraud, she convinces her daughters Harrie and Stella that their emergency shelter is a holiday hotel. Taking care of her children while being the main breadwinner seems impossible, but Sandra won't go down without a fight: with heroism and creativity, she gives her daughters the best summer of their lives.

title: Another World
overview: After death, before reincarnation, the souls of the deceased transit through a fantastical realm known as, Another World. Gudo is a spirit that helps to guide these transient souls to their reincarnation. While guiding a young girl named Yuri, he learns that humans have emotions that he does not understand. Tasked by Goddess Mira to help Yuri control her rage and prevent her transformation into a monster, Gudo embarks on a perilous mission.

title: Another World
overview: After death, before reincarnation, the souls of the deceased transit through a fantastical realm known as, Another World. Gudo is a spirit that helps to guide these transient souls to their reincarnation. While guiding a young girl named Yuri, he learns that humans have emotions that he does not understand. Tasked by Goddess Mira to help Yuri control her rage and prevent her transformation into a monster, Gudo embarks on a perilous mission.

title: Far from Maine
overview: Haunted by the killing by Israeli police of a Palestinian friend from his youth, an Israeli queer filmmaker embarks on a cinematic dialogue across time — confronting memory, friendship, and the genocide unfolding today.  In this intimate cinematic letter, Israeli filmmaker Roy Cohen addresses his Palestinian friend and fellow peace activist Aseel Aslih, who was murdered by Israeli police in their youth. Cohen tells Aslih of his experiences navigating a growingly genocidal society and seeks Aslih’s moral clarity and resilience in the evocative letters he had written as a teenager.

title: Project Baby
overview: The story follows Sandy, a 30-something advertising executive who, fearing her biological clock is ticking, launches "Project Baby"—a step-by-step mission to conceive a child on her own terms with a no-strings-attached donor. She selects Migo, a sensitive artist, but quickly realizes that meticulous plans can't account for human emotion.

title: Back In the Game
overview: Eight years ago, Jiale, a senior member in the gang, takes the blame for his brother and goes to prison. After his release, he wants to live peacefully in a small coastal town, away from the underworld. However, his former boss, Rong, intends to hand over the gang to him, while Huoshan, who rose to power thanks to Jiale's sacrifice, sees his return as a huge threat. As power, lies, and old grudges intertwine, Jiale has no choice but to return to the underworld. Along the way, he saves Jiehe, a girl with a music dream on the verge of despair, and she becomes a glimmer of light in his dark life. To protect the ones he cherishes and account for his past, he picks up the knife again. A thrilling gunfight breaks out in the dark alleys of the city, and he turns the tables time and again with his skills. Tearing off Huoshan's disguise, the truth from eight years ago comes to light.

title: 钟馗
overview: A girl meets Zhong Kui, the deity who vanquishes ghosts and demons. Partnering to solve cases, they discover a great conspiracy against the mortal realm.

title: Ask E. Jean
overview: The thrilling story of E. Jean Carroll’s life, from her early days as Miss Cheerleader USA to her rise as a trailblazing journalist, author, and beloved advice columnist. Carroll broke barriers as the first female editor at Esquire, Playboy, and Outside, helping to redefine women’s roles in media with her sharp wit and fearless voice. In recent years, she reignited public discourse by standing up to power, becoming the only woman to beat Donald Trump twice in court, and sparking a national conversation about truth, accountability, and resilience. A portrait of an indomitable woman who proved it’s never too late to reclaim your voice, rewrite your story, and change the world.

title: Piter FM
overview: Masha, who works for a radio station, and Maxim, a street sweeper with an architectural degree, cross paths with each other when they are at an indecisive point in their lives.

title: OZI: Voice of the Forest
overview: Separated from her parents when their forest home is destroyed, Ozi is taken in by kind wildlife sanctuary owners who keep her safe and slowly teach her to communicate through sign language. With the combination of her new skills and natural talent for social media, Ozi soon has a worldwide following. When she learns that her parents might be alive, Ozi sets off on a quest to find them and to tell the world what is happening to the rainforest before it’s too late. With help from new friends, cheeky monkey Chance and loveable rhino Honkus, Ozi discovers that one voice really can change the world.

title: Night of Champions 2026
overview: The 2026 Night of Champions, also promoted as Night of Champions: Riyadh, is a professional wrestling pay-per-view and livestreaming event produced by the American company WWE. It is the 12th Night of Champions in history and took place on Saturday, June 27, 2026.

title: The Punishment Tapes
overview: Julia, a renowned crime journalist celebrated for exposing and bringing down the notorious serial killer Gianni Lenzi, finds herself drawn into a darker chapter when she receives a mysterious package-a collection of disturbing snuff films. The sender: Milian, an infamous underground filmmaker known for his grotesque and brutal work. Invited to his secluded home for an exclusive interview, Julia agrees, driven by curiosity and the promise of another explosive story. But as the camera rolls and the truth begins to unravel, Julia discovers that Milian's latest production may be more personal-and more dangerous-than she ever imagined.

title: Andy Lau “TODAY…is the Day” Hong Kong Concert Tour 2024/25
original_title: 刘德华《今天…is the Day》迴演唱會2024/2025 - 香港站
overview: This concert was professionally filmed for the Hong Kong show, as part of Andy Lau's most recent tour across 72 shows from 5th July 2024 to 10th January 2025

title: Crash
overview: After surviving a tragic car accident, a man with a learner's licence and a dead phone must find his way home while battling the grief of losing his cousin.

title: Home Along da Riles: Da Reunion
original_title: Home Along da Riles: Da Reunion
overview: Years after Kevin Cosme's death, his children strive to uphold the values he taught them. Tensions arise when Bing announces her plan to marry her mysterious long-time boyfriend, prompting her brothers Bill, Bob, Baldo, and Estong to attempt to stop the wedding. Meanwhile, Azon, Kevin's widow, becomes saddened by the children's growing disunity and apparent abandonment of the values they were raised with, while imagining visions of Kevin as if he were still alive.

title: Out of the Nest
original_title: องครักษ์พิทักษ์เจี๊ยบ
overview: Teenage delivery boy Arthur the Goat wants nothing more than to be Castilia's greatest barber. When the royal fledglings are taken, it falls to Arthur to rescue them and save the kingdom, but first he must discover his own past.

title: Evolution
overview: When an alien substance mixes Zoe’s DNA with that of her exotic pets, a hilarious adventure begins where humans turn into animals, animals turn into humans, and everyone must come to an agreement to save the world.

title: The Furious
overview: When YouTuber-boxer Danial insults their late father's name, brothers Firdaus and Hakim reunite - one fighting for redemption, the other for revenge - in a battle that will decide not just who wins, but what remains of The Furious legacy.

title: 7 Piano Sketches
overview: A piano tuner wanders through the streets of New York after dark, seeking artistic inspiration. Sketchbook in hand, he observes the city’s lovers, mourners, and giant ants from afar. But when a twist of fate brings him face-to-face with a kindred spirit, he finds what he was looking for all along.

title: Cinderella's Curse
overview: Desperate Cinderella summons her fairy godmother from an ancient flesh-bound book, seeking revenge on her evil stepmother and stepsisters who abuse and torment her daily.

title: Pickleball
overview: When foreclosure threatens their community center, Father Joseph rallies his late friend’s sons into an underdog pickleball team for a $100,000 tournament—against a cocky tennis legend determined to seize the courts and steal the spotlight.

title: Taming The Beast
overview: The world strongest man learns how to embrace his mental health challenges by confronting his inner demons and dealing with his biggest failure to date which ultimately changes his life.

title: The Letter
overview: A young postwoman tries to rebuild her relationship with her father, coming to terms with the pain of abandonment, the weight of the past and new bonds.

title: True Story of a Woman in Jail: Hell of Love
original_title: 新・実録おんな鑑別所　恋獄
overview: Mayumi is sent to jail after brutally attacking her partner and his mistress. Sent to live in Cell 31, the women there couldn't be more different... they are very religious, sing hymns and discuss the Bible.  A fight with a rival cell block starts a bloody and vicious war in the jail... one where the warden and guards seek vengeance on the women with brutal torture and sexual humiliation.  When a new inmate arrives and Mayumi recognizes her, all hell breaks loose!

title: Poldi
overview: Footballer, entrepreneur, fan favorite and true community hero — Lukas Podolski reflects on his journey and what comes next in this intimate documentary.

title: Alerta Roja
overview: Midpoint Presents: Alerta Roja (Red Alert)  She entered the bathroom thinking she'd only be there for a few minutes...  Based on unfortunately possible events.

title: Double Occupancy
overview: Rajini transforms between woman by day and man by night, hiding this gender swap from partners creating tangled complications.

title: Luminesence
overview: In a ruined city consumed by a lethal entity of light, a partially blind teenager and his older sister fight to survive. But when a mysterious encounter disrupts their fragile existence, they are forced to face their deepest fears and long-buried desires.

title: Lake George
overview: Newly released from prison, a white-collar criminal, used to dealing with numbers, is tasked with one last job by his boss: kill the boss’ girlfriend before she talks.

title: Mi vecina la buchona
overview: A federal agent moves to a town controlled by organized crime to keep an eye on a feared hitman. Getting too close to her target could jeopardize the entire mission.

title: Fantasy Life
overview: An anxious New York law school dropout stumbles into a job babysitting his psychiatrist's three granddaughters and falls for the girls' mother, an actress in a rocky marriage.

title: Snake Hole
overview: Due to a past trauma an elegant wife cannot enjoy her husband attentions in bed. Undeterred he hires a B&D master to give him a few pointers on how to reignite her repressed erotic desires.

title: Never After Dark
overview: A traveling psychic who helps lost souls cross over encounters a powerful entity at a remote house. While investigating its origins, she uncovers dark secrets and faces a deadly threat from an unexpected source.

title: Lifeline
overview: How far would you go, and what would you risk for the one you love? What drives Ananya, a city girl, to this distant village and where will her journey lead?

title: Strangers in the Mountain
overview: In the 1990s, two police officers ventured into the mountains along Zhejiang's Shanxi Stream to track down a suspect from an old case. As they dug deeper into the past, long-buried memories resurfaced, stirring poignant recollections among everyone involved about Zhang Xue, the person who had gone missing.

title: Pieces of a Foreign Life
overview: Woman flees war-torn Syria, leaving family behind. Seeking asylum in Bordeaux, she meets French lawyer who helps her rebuild life. Unexpected relationship forms between them amid her struggle to resettle.

title: A Matter of Life and Death
overview: Haya's convinced she's going to die before thirty, so she's living like it — loud, reckless, completely unfiltered, no brakes. Then one of her stunts goes wrong and lands her in the ER... right into Youssef. A heart surgeon. Calm, controlled, lives by a schedule. The human opposite of her in every way.  Naturally, she decides he's her destiny.  What follows is chaotic, funny, and a little bit ridiculous — neon nights, strange rituals, the kind of moments you can't plan for. Her countdown keeps ticking. His walls keep cracking. And somewhere in between, they both start remembering what it actually feels like to be alive.  A love story for anyone who's ever felt like too much.

title: Crossing A Dawn
overview: During a date, Xu Qiu and Chen Yuzhou's serendipitous encounter leads to repeatedly thwarted attempts at intimacy, yet a night of urban wonders gradually unveils their guarded emotions, culminating in an unforgettable love.

title: Stepfather
overview: After years of eradicating any family that falls short of perfection, Darnell believes his new wife Asia and her daughters might finally be the real deal. That is, until tensions rise and they uncover his deadly pattern. Now, getting rid of them won’t be as easy as he planned.

title: O Horizon
overview: Abby, a brilliant, young neuroscientist who has recently lost her father, drowns her grief by spending her days working with a monkey named Dorey. Abby meets a programmer, Sam, who has created a technology that reconnects Abby with her beloved father. Her relationship with her digitized dad then forces her to re-examine everything from her romantic relationships to her life’s work.

title: Solomamma
overview: Edith is a curiosity-driven journalist and single mother. Solo parenting proves to be complicated, but when the identity of the man who donated the sperm that got her pregnant surfaces, she seeks him out under the false pretext of interviewing him about his company.

title: Curiosity Killed the Cat
overview: A struggling young writer finds inspiration when a package is delivered to the wrong address, leading her to discover and investigate her neighbour's dark secret.

title: Putin
overview: A portrait of a formidable political figure, unraveling the contrasting facets of an iron-fisted tyrant and a man haunted by fear.

title: Unconnected
overview: Sylvia Vanguard is a woman who seems to have it all: Money, success, and a good man. But now that she has reached her pinnacle, she's ready to take on the one thing that she has sacrificed to achieve her goals- motherhood. After being denied by her longtime boyfriend, she decides to move forward alone with using unconventional methods to have a child, and ends up getting way more than she bargained for.

title: Five Friends 2: Mount Klawih
overview: Three years after climbing Mount Madyopuro, the five friends' friendship has grown stronger. When they reunite for Andrew's daughter's birthday, they witness the family threatened with becoming a sacrifice for a black magic ritual! They set off to accompany Andrew to Mount Klawih. However, Juna has disappeared into the realm of demons!

title: True Justice: Eye For An Eye
original_title: True Justice: Eye For An Eye
overview: Amateur sleuths tackle a fresh challenge at a local school, diving into the fierce world of parent politics. Their investigation uncovers hidden agendas and unexpected alliances as they navigate the complex web within the community.

title: Diabolik: Who Are You?
overview: Captured by a ruthless gang of bank robbers, foes Diabolik and Ginko find themselves facing certain death. While Eva Kant and Altea forge an unlikely alliance to rescue their lovers, Diabolik reveals his mysterious past to the Inspector.

title: Splish Splash Forever!
overview: 11-year-old Pola and her best friend Polly spend all their time at the local outdoor pool, Plitsch Platsch, where Polly's parents run a café. When the pool is closed due to budget cuts and Polly's family moves away, Pola suddenly finds herself alone. Refusing to give up, she teams up with her clever new classmate Rosalie to try to save the pool. Together, they start a petition and rally with the local children. Along the way, Pola discovers new friendships and learns that change is a part of growing up.

title: Un amor
overview: Upon settling in the countryside village of La Escapa, Nat accepts a disturbing sexual proposal by neighbour Andreas, paving the way for a self-consuming passion.

title: The Boy with the Light Blue Eyes
original_title: Το Αγόρι με τα Γαλάζια Μάτια
overview: A cursed blue-eyed boy seeks love in a remote mountain ruled by superstition.

title: Calle Malaga
overview: Maria Angeles, a 79-year-old Spanish woman, lives alone in Tangier, Morocco, and enjoys her daily routine. However, her life is turned upside down when her daughter arrives from Madrid to sell the apartment in which she has always lived. Determined to stay, she does everything she can to get her home and her belongings back and, unexpectedly, rediscovers love and sensuality.

title: Nuclear Boy
overview: The lonely 17-year-old outcast Aike craves attention and finds it online where he conducts dangerous chemistry experiments. Hoping to pull Aike out of his internet bubble, his mother, a hardworking nurse, sends him to the scouts to make real friends. When that fails, Aike feels rejected and hurt. To prove himself to the world, he begins his biggest experiment yet: he secretly builds a nuclear breeder reactor in his mother's shed, encouraged by a growing group of internet followers.

title: Million Dollar Madness
overview: Under immense pressure and amidst competition with a duplicitous colleague, Stan, the ambitious and very serious operations manager of a construction firm reaches breaking point when he learns that he’s been unfairly laid off by the company’s tyrannical CEO. He impulsively steals one million euros from the company’s vault, tosses away the key to the safe and hastily flees with his fiancée Marine… Before discovering that his termination was a mistake, and he is actually being promoted! Stan has until sunrise to return the money to the vault. But having thrown away his key, and with the only spare inside the CEO’s own apartment, he must reluctantly enlist the help of Hippolyte, Paris’s most unpredictable locksmith. The night promises to be full of twists and turns!

title: LYTLE 2014
overview: An argument unfolds in the midst of everything else that has ever happened.

title: Ingeborg Bachmann – Jemand, der einmal ich war
original_title: Ingeborg Bachmann – Jemand, der einmal ich war
overview: Sandra Hüller portrays Ingeborg Bachmann on an imaginary day in Rome. Regina Schilling’s hybrid film weaves together reenactments, archival footage, and Bachmann’s own writings into a portrait that offers a refreshing new perspective on the author and positions her writings as a reference point in current debates on gender relations and power.

title: French Girls
overview: A young woman enters the uniquely absurd world of modelling in this Sydney microbudget marvel. The debut feature of Hyun Lee.  Mia is drifting through life working on construction sites when she’s scouted by a Sydney model agent. Suddenly, she’s making more money than ever while working less – something her boyfriend loves to point out. Mia quietly observes this strange new world of modelling with deep uncertainty. Is this really the life she wants? With one curious turn after another, she finds herself in trouble with the law.

title: Where the Heart Lands
overview: A Kentucky horse trainer's world is upended when a handsome LA lawyer inherits her stable. To stop him from selling, she and the locals drag him into the excitement of horse racing, finding love along the way.

title: The Jealous Bride
overview: As Meg prepares for her wedding, the return of a woman from her fiancé's past ignites a wave of jealousy she can't contain. Consumed by doubt, she soon spirals into a dangerous obsession that threatens to destroy her love, her faith and her future.

title: No Volveré
overview: A lonely ventriloquist is served divorce papers at the showroom bar where he works. Things take a strange turn when he tries to remedy the situation with his puppet, Luis.

title: The Blind Girl and an Elephant
overview: Three girls try to flee their village to escape the superstitions and fanatic hostility surrounding them. Only the blind girl makes it out, finding herself face-to-face with an elephant.

title: Broken English
overview: A survivor, provocateur and true original, Marianne has spent more than six decades defying expectations — releasing over thirty-five albums while constantly reinventing herself. Made with her full involvement, Broken English is an intimate and unflinching exploration of a fractured yet unbreakable life shaped by fame, creativity and relentless public scrutiny.

title: The Crucian
overview: Born never to cry, Fish seeks his missing mother through the underworld. He believes her ghost is imprisoned within a deity puppet — yet, it conceals neither his mother nor an informant, but a survivor. Through the puppet’s mouth, the seaside street’s buried past unfolds.

title: Cotton Queen
overview: In a cotton-farming village in Sudan, teenage Nafisa is raised on heroic tales of battling British colonizers told by her grandmother, the village matriarch Al-Sit. But when a young businessman arrives from abroad with a new development plan and genetically engineered cotton, Nafisa becomes the center of a power play to determine the future of the village. Awakening to her own strength, Nafisa sets out to save the cotton fields – and herself. Neither she nor her community will ever be the same again.

title: Peter Asher: Everywhere Man
overview: Peter Asher’s extraordinary life has intersected with some of the greatest artists and musical moments of the last six decades. A child actor who became a pop star and then a manager and producer to the likes of James Taylor and Linda Ronstadt, he is a Zelig-like figure who remains a vital creative force to this day. Featuring interviews with Paul McCartney, Carole King, and many more.

title: Nothing Personal
overview: Lina, a well-known TV host, appears at Pedro’s doorstep to confront him about a cruel message he posted about her online. What begins as a showdown soon turns into an awkward living arrangement that quietly reshapes them both.

title: Deewana
overview: Munna, an ordinary boy in an ordinary world, sees a beauty that feels beyond his reach. While he struggles to become worthy of her, she is quietly learning to leave.

title: Peace by Piece
overview: Jeremy’s quiet day in the park is interrupted when he's approached Martin, a strange and enigmatic man claiming to be an actor from the future preparing to play Jeremy in a film. Martin hints at future events, leaving Jeremy to interpret how much is true. Clues are dropped, questions are raised, and Jeremy begins to realize that his own story may be more complicated than he ever expected. Shot in a single unbroken take, through the perspective of an autonomous drone, Peace by Piece follows one conversation that slowly reveals the consequences Jeremy will one day face. Like Jeremy, the audience discovers the truth, piece by piece, until the final revelation.

title: Burrow
overview: A year after the death of her brother, a young woman joins her friends on a drug-infused getaway that spirals into a night of horror when an alien insect burrows into one of her friends, transforming him into a vicious man-eating creature.

title: Three Wishes of Cinderella
overview: In this magical, funny twist on Cinderella, a woodcutter transformed into a chipmunk, a nut-granting tree, and true love help her escape a forced royal wedding.

title: East of Wall
overview: After the death of her husband, Tabatha—a young, tattooed, rebellious horse trainer—wrestles with financial insecurity and unresolved grief while providing refuge for a group of wayward teenagers on her broken-down ranch in the Badlands.

title: Unidentified
overview: The body of a teenage girl is found in the heart of the desert, he raised many questions about the girl's personality, the lady decides to search for the circumstances of the crime and collect information about the unknown body, and solves the mystery surrounded by the crime.

title: Робоняня
overview: Cheerful and inventive Zlata, who stays at home alone for the sake of the school ball and the first kiss, under the supervision of the newest robot nanny Notrix. Confident that she can easily trick the car, Zlata soon discovers that she is dealing with an invulnerable opponent who controls the entire house. Desperate, she and her neighbor Nikita, who is in love with her, find an unconventional way out - they begin to communicate with the robot in its language, using "perfect promts". Their friendship with their iron friend is rapidly gaining momentum and leads to a huge party, which turns into real chaos. It is at this moment that Zlata has to make a choice and understand what true friendship and self-sacrifice are.

title: Bad Counselors
overview: After committing a crime on campus, two frat-stars pretend to be Christian camp counselors in order to fulfill court ordered community service.

title: Farewell AKAB Okretnica
overview: As one of Belgrade’s last DIY anti-nationalist spaces faces closure, its community gathers for a final night — a farewell that becomes a quiet act of resistance.

title: Love Barista
overview: A superstar Korean actor stranded in Vietnam ends up crossing paths with a sweet, ordinary barista-to-be, kicking off an unpredictable, heart-fluttery romance that shakes up both their worlds.

title: Phera
overview: Two men share a house and a past that no longer fits them. As city life pulls Palash forward and age holds his father Pannalal in place, an unexpected return forces them to confront their differences and the quiet truths they have avoided.

title: Shana
overview: Shana navigates the trials and tribulations of everyday life with boundless energy and the support of her group of friends. When her grandmother passes away, she inherits a ring that is supposed to protect her from bad luck. Shana certainly needs this helping hand. Especially since her toxic partner has been released from prison, and misfortunes are piling up…

title: The City of the Shattered Sun Episode 1 - The fall of the Elites
original_title: The City of the Shattered Sun Episode 1 - The fall of the Elites
overview: When two armed burglars break into the home of a powerful Elite, they quickly realise they have made a catastrophic mistake. Outmatched and outgunned, the encounter sets off a chain of events that sends the Elite hurtling through a malfunctioning teleporter and stranding him alone in the wasteland outside the city walls — where something is already watching.

title: Stardust
overview: When his father brings his new girlfriend to the seaside, a withdrawn boy is forced to share his grief with someone he doesn't want to know.

title: Bogatyrs
overview: Ancient Rus. The hero Svyatogor defeated the evil Sorcerer who wanted to conquer Rus - to do this, he used magic to turn into a Dragon. Svyatogor hid three artifacts (the claw, eye, and vein of the Dragon) in the modern world so that evil would never return. But because of the schoolboy Vanya, the Sorcerer's beloved enters our time. She wants to find these artifacts, resurrect the Dragon, and bring her betrothed back to life. Together with two heroes from ancient Rus, Vanya must find the villain and prevent her from carrying out her plan.

title: Kyrie
overview: Luca lost her family in the Great East Japan Earthquake causing her not to be able to speak. However, her singing voice shakes the hearts of those who listen to her. It is a hymn of compassion played by Luca and the people.

title: Dosa: Penebusan atau Pengampunan
overview: Bima and her wife, Ersya, have an accident while they're going out of the town and they are trapped in a mysterious hotel, where they are terrorized and forced to face past sins that cannot be avoided.

title: 'Ain
overview: Joy, a beauty influencer obsessed with popularity. Her past as a fat and neglected teenager has made her extremely narcissistic. Her best friend, Dini, warns Joy to stop showing off her beauty for fear of contracting a disease, but Joy ignores her. Eventually, she experiences a horrific event that leaves her body in a disgusting state.

title: The Curse Of Black Pond
overview: A group of teenagers go to an old house on vacation with a big black pond, what they don't know is that a long time ago, a witch was drowned and killed there and now she's back for revenge, on those who live in her house.

title: Daydream
overview: A young adult recounts childhood memories involving his 6th grade teacher and the lessons she taught, particularly her unconventional assignment: to daydream.

title: The Monkey bar
overview: Three childhood friends return to their favorite college bar a night before a wedding ,only to discover that the bar remembers them. The stools they sit on unlock personal truths they've buried for years. Guided by the spirits of Gandhi’s three monkeys, they see, hear, and speak the uncomfortable realities they’ve long avoided ,and leave the night changed forever.

title: The Ultimate Duo
overview: Jae-hyuk was once a star detective in the regional investigation unit, but after losing his marriage and missing promotions, he's now a washed-up small-town cop whose life has completely fallen apart. His new partner is Jung-ho, a rookie detective and former influencer armed with sharp intelligence, ambition, money, and youth. The mismatched duo doesn't click at all, but one day they arrest a thief who stole from a church donation box and discover he's a prime suspect in a Gangnam murder case. However, the case has already been closed with another perpetrator arrested. To catch the real killer, they head to Seoul on a business trip. With prosecutor Mi-ju's promise to support are investigation, they request cooperation from Gangnam Police Station. But their questionable teamwork - or is it team-killing? - puts the case in jeopardy.

title: Yumeno Kyusaku's Girl Hell
overview: Utae and Aiko attend an all-girl private school where the devoutly religious principal seems to be raping some of the students, including Utae.

title: Fairyland
overview: A father-daughter relationship evolves through an era of bohemian decadence in 1970s San Francisco to the sober and heartbreaking era of the AIDS crisis in the 1980s.

title: Gorgonà
overview: Greece. A small, impoverished city-state dominated by a massive refinery—its only source of income: oil. The men, all armed, hold absolute power. Their leader, Nikos, is gravely ill and must arrange his succession. Shock spreads when he includes his protégé, Maria, among the contenders. The fate of this young woman—unaware of the most tragic part of her family’s past—will be turned upside down by the arrival of Eleni, a singer at the town’s bar.

title: The Great Lillian Hall
overview: Lillian Hall, a Broadway actress, has never missed a performance throughout her long, illustrious career. Yet in rehearsals for a new play her confidence is challenged. People and events conspire to take away her ability to do what she loves most.

title: Here The Whole Time
overview: An insecure teenager's vacation plans are ruined by an unexpected visitor: his neighbor and school crush who will spend two weeks sleeping at his house. The days that promised peace, tranquility and epic series marathons end up bringing a whirlwind of feelings and unresolved issues.

title: Curly Burly
overview: Krølle Bølle lives safely underground on Bornholm with his family and all the other trolls. Life here is full of bat flights, cave parties—and rules, lots of rules. One rule in particular must never be broken: do not go up to the surface, because humans are dangerous. But Krølle Bølle is a troublemaker who doesn’t quite understand what all the rules are for.  When a sudden rumbling comes from above, he sneaks up toward the human world to see what’s happening. His little sister Borra follows him, and what begins as an innocent mischief-filled outing for the two of them quickly turns into a grand adventure—full of danger, magic, and experiences greater than anything Krølle Bølle could ever have dreamed of.

title: Renoir
overview: In 1987 Tokyo, a quirky and sensitive 11-year-old girl copes with a terminally ill father and stressed-out working mother while encountering various adults dealing with their own struggles.

title: God of Mischief
overview: When a cheeky 10-year-old boy sets his sights on playing Loki in the school play, his over-the-top confidence costs him the role, but he hatches a mischievous plan to prove he's the real god of mischief after all.

title: The Wave
overview: A music student’s testimony ignites a feminist uprising on her campus, where protest becomes performance and collective voice becomes an act of resistance.

title: The Wave
overview: A music student’s testimony ignites a feminist uprising on her campus, where protest becomes performance and collective voice becomes an act of resistance.

title: Nicolás de Jesús' Now You See Me...
overview: Struggling fair owner Kesselring (Nicolás de Jesús) is given a unique opportunity to restore the fair to its former glory when his friend Dr. Goodkat (Fredy Roque) introduces him to Marcus Kelevra (Alexis Adrián), a man whose mysterious act will draw people back to the fair, at a deadly cost, and even sparking interest among his fellow fairgoers.

title: Boys Go to Jupiter
overview: A teenager in suburban Florida desperately hustles to make $5,000 in this dreamy and surreal animated coming-of-age story.

title: Miss Mermaid
overview: Freshly divorced, Fanny, a thirty-something from Fécamp, has nothing left of her marriage but a sky-blue sofa, debts she refuses to pay, and an absolute determination never to 'start her life' with a man again. Despite her burning need for freedom, this cleaning lady finds herself stuck back at her parents' house.  That is, until the day she crosses paths with Anemone, a professional mermaid passing through the region. She decides to take the plunge and dive into the world of mermaiding.

title: The Painted
overview: When Evelyn Elster inherits her estranged cousin's fortune she thinks her family has finally gotten the break they've needed. Little do they know they've not only inherited her cousin's riches, but also a family curse, and must do whatever they can to avoid becoming its latest victims.

title: Blood Lines
overview: Whilst embarking on a lesbian relationship with the new girl in town, a Métis woman’s life is rocked to the core when her estranged mother returns.

title: Mil pedazos
overview: Miguel (55), Isabel (45), and Emilia (9) go on vacation with their dog, Eve. Suddenly, an accident in the middle of the desert leaves the mother seriously injured. Miguel, trying to save Emilia, embarks on a personal journey with his daughter to find answers about what happened. Three months later, Isabel awakens from a coma and begins a personal, loving, and intuitive quest to rebuild her family.

title: Alessia Cara: Giant Desk Concert
overview: In the first (or maybe only) episode of Giant Desk, Alessia Cara is invited on as a guest to perform six tracks from throughout her discography.

title: Jinsei
overview: Our hero (voiced by rapper ACE COOL), called by a different name in each chapter of his life, becomes a J-pop idol, an outcast, a leader, and an oracle in this hundred-year chronicle spanning the past, present, and future. Through a chance encounter with a transfer student, he trains to become an idol, starting his search for self-identity and a journey toward greatness beyond superstardom. Written, directed, edited and entirely hand-drawn by newcomer Ryuya Suzuki over eighteen months, JINSEI (meaning “life” in Japanese) is an anime tour-de-force that announces Suzuki to the world as a bold new talent in independent animation.

title: Di Renjie: Bloodstained Coffin
overview: During the Lantern Festival, a strange murder suddenly occurs. Di Renjie stakes his life and steps into the mysterious situation alone. He clears away the thick fog, traces the murderer, and every step is full of suspense.

title: Out of Control
overview: Julien and Marie have enjoyed 15 years of seemingly stable marriage until Anaëlle, Julien’s childhood flame, returns. Her sudden presence awakens old insecurities in Marie, who begins to doubt Julien’s devotion and question her self-worth. Amid this emotional storm, Marie is drawn to Thomas, a charismatic stranger who offers her the validation she craves.

title: Kata Hati
overview: When celebrity actress Ayra Natasha's glamorous life unravels in one humiliating night - a red carpet disaster, a cheating boyfriend, and a viral disappearance, she finds herself in the back seat of a stranger's car, ugly-crying into a box of tissues. Her unlikely rescuer is Imran Firdaus, an e-hailing driver with nowhere particular to be and no reason to care… except that he does.  What begins as a forced arrangement - Imran hired as Ayra's personal driver to contain a tabloid storm slowly becomes the one real thing in both their lives. But Ayra belongs to a carefully constructed world of sponsors, film contracts, and a power couple narrative that her manager-sister Maya cannot afford to let fall apart.  Kata Hati is a Malay-language romantic comedy about the words we perform for the world, and the ones we only dare say to the ones we love.

title: 1: Nenokkadine
overview: A rock star must overcome his psychological inhibitions to seek revenge for his parents' death.

title: Donkey Days
overview: Sisters Anna and Charlotte have always fought for their mother’s attention. As old wounds reopen and suck them back to their family home, they unravel mesmerizing mysteries, including anonymous ashes and their mother’s love for a donkey. Will they come to terms with each other?

title: A Place for Her
overview: At the Maison des Femmes, women victims of violence are cared for. Elsewhere, they are threatened, brutalized, raped, mutilated, their suffering ignored. Here, they are listened to, supported, helped and believed. Diane, Manon, Inès, Awa and the others will give them a helping hand until they can stand up again. As a team. Even if it means risking their own equilibrium.

title: Midnight City
overview: Dutch Lazarus is a detective who specializes in strange cases. When a new client walks into his office and stymies him at every turn, we begin to wonder what her game is, and if Dutch already knows a lot more more than she's telling.

title: Detached
overview: Flor and his best friend Otis have always done everything together, but when a conversation reveals that their bond means different things to each of them, Flor is forced to confront a friendship he thought was unbreakable.

title: François.e
overview: François, a 50-year-old screenwriter whose career is on the decline, cynically ticks the "transgender" box to secure funding for his latest TV series project. When, against all odds, his plan works and his project is accepted, he finds himself having to portray… Françoise, an author beginning her transition. Unable to fulfill the required role, he must team up with Sarah, a real trans writer. As Françoise, François finally achieves success. He fills his bank account and reconnects with his teenage daughter… but as his deception continues, the price to pay proves higher than expected: his truest bonds are forged around his new identity. Françoise liberates him as much as she imprisons him.

title: Mimi The Mime
overview: A homeless mime and a struggling clown fight over the attention of a crowd on a NYC sidewalk.  When their fight draws more attention and money than their performances ever could, they  realize they struck gold. Broke, desperate and out of options, the pair transform their slapstick  routines into an underground bare-knuckle sensation called ‘Mime vs Clown’.

title: The Last First Time
original_title: El fin de las primeras veces
overview: Eduardo, an 18-year-old kid from a small village in Jalisco, travels to Guadalajara. In this big and strange city, away from the eyes of his parents, he experiences his first encounters in love and sex.

title: Street of Joy
original_title: 赤線玉の井 ぬけられます
overview: It's the evening before the day all brothels must be shut-down, according to the new law, in 1958. At the Kofukuya's (literally, the house that sells happiness), five prostitutes decide to celebrate the day. Eroticism, drama, and comedy mix as each hour a different event passes, in which all the women's stories come to the surface.

title: The Next Karate Kid
overview: Twelve-year-old Sasha is forced to leave Moscow for Pyatigorsk to live with his aunt while his doctor parents are on assignment in Africa. Local children, school bullying, and conflict with the leader, Marat, become part of his new life. When his parents disappear during a flood, the boy faces utter despair. Seeking strength, he discovers a passion-karate, where his strict sensei, Dmitriy, and his daughter, Masha, help him overcome his fears, develop his character, and find inner strength.

title: 404 Still Remain
overview: In 2001, Lee Gyeong-hwan and his mother move from rural Yeongcheon to the city of Daegu to leave behind a broken marriage and hurtful rumours. Reticent and shy, he struggles to acclimatise but his seatmate happens to be Jae-min, the cool class president who takes Gyeong-hwan under his wing. While they quickly bond over a shared love of Japanese culture, particularly the music of Globe, Jae-min's affectionate and open attitude allows Gyeong-hwan to relax and reveal his feelings in a world where he must hide them.

title: Tales of Taipei
overview: A heartfelt piece that tells the stories of Taipei streets, people and communities. From ten directors across the globe, creating ten unique stories of Taipei, through various backgrounds, delivering the same heartfelt message.

title: Eventually
overview: A struggling but capable teenager works through his increasingly odd responsibilities on a family farm.

title: Rain Reign
overview: Rose Howard, a neurodivergent 12-year-old girl raised by her volatile single father, is forced to abandon her daily routines when a superstorm devastates their town and her beloved dog, Rain, goes missing. With the support of her uncle, Rose embarks on a determined search for Rain — a journey that challenges her resilience and compels her to make an impossible choice between her own needs and doing what is right.

title: Heart Set on Her
overview: Mia and Emma decide to take the next step toward marriage, only to find their first challenge lies in bringing their families together. Amid complicated traditions, dowry preparations, and the chaos of wedding planning, they face arguments, doubts, and uncertainty about the future. As expectations from both sides begin to weigh on them, they start to question what happiness truly means—and whether marriage is really the answer.

title: Homage
overview: A reformed street figure risks everything when he tries to help an old friend fresh out of prison, only to discover that some debts don't disappear; they come back to collect.

title: Forastera
overview: Cata will see her summer vacation disrupted by the absurd and sudden death of her grandmother, which only she witnesses. Her grief shifts when she casually turns to play pretend, transforming into the deceased. What begins with a game of dress-up will blur the lines of reality and family roles.

title: Forge
overview: In Miami, siblings Raymond and Coco Zhang’s art forgery ring flourishes when they encounter a disgraced millionaire in need of their expertise. Meanwhile, FBI Art Crimes agent Emily Lee moves to Miami to investigate a series of mysterious paintings.

title: The Abyss
overview: Dasha and Sasha are a happy newlywed. A honeymoon and a parachute jump over the foothills of Mount Elbrus are supposed to be the beginning of their new life. But fate intervenes. The pilot turns out to be Artyom - Dasha's ex, a man she didn't even want to remember. When the plane crashes, the three are forced to jump without training. The lines get tangled. They miraculously survive - but find themselves suspended over a mountain abyss amid raging forest fires. Dasha finds herself between two men, each of whom is tied to her life. One is the present. The other is an unhealed past.

title: Gugu's World
overview: Gugu, a black boy living with his grandmother, experiences memories and revelations when the old city where she lived returns.

title: Open Endings
overview: Four queer women in their 30s who are exes-turned-best-friends navigate adulthood, love, friendship, chosen families, and everything in between.

title: Borom Baax
overview: A lonely petrol station attendant summons a spirit to make his wishes come true, but finds himself confronted by something sinister.

title: Don't Let the Sun
overview: In a world almost like ours, Jonah works for an agency that offers human relationships. When he's hired to serve as Nika's father, he begins to lose control of his tightly controlled life.

title: My Coluche
overview: It’s the story of two guys — a comedian and a journalist — who become friends and get up to all sorts of antics. It’s the story of two men reflecting their era. It’s the story of one man, Coluche, seen through the eyes of his friend, Michel Denisot. It’s the story of his Coluche.

title: Kyle Larson vs. The Double
overview: Two-time NASCAR champion Kyle Larson attempts the notorious "Double," racing the Indianapolis 500 and the Coca-Cola 600 on the same day. With weather, exhaustion, and risk closing in, 1,100 miles offers a rare inside look at one of the toughest challenges in motorsports-and the man daring enough to take it on.

title: Beneath the Blue Ice
overview: Tasha, a college student, finds herself caught between Layson, a devoted hockey player who loves her, and Aaron, who is only using her. As loyalties are tested on and off the ice, she has to decide who truly has her heart.

title: Duse
overview: In the years between WWI and the rise of Fascism, legendary thespian Eleonora Duse shocks everyone by getting back onstage at over 60 years of age. Struggling with the brutality of historical events unfolding and clinging to the possibility of utopia, she makes her art a revolutionary act, even at the cost of sacrificing health and affection—facing her final journey aware she could give up life itself, but not her own true nature.

title: Duse
overview: In the years between WWI and the rise of Fascism, legendary thespian Eleonora Duse shocks everyone by getting back onstage at over 60 years of age. Struggling with the brutality of historical events unfolding and clinging to the possibility of utopia, she makes her art a revolutionary act, even at the cost of sacrificing health and affection—facing her final journey aware she could give up life itself, but not her own true nature.

title: The Ties That Bind Us
overview: A young single father trying to find the strength to love. A feminist librarian, single by conviction, who’s decided that she won’t be a mother. A six-year-old child trying to find a place in a new family structure. By revealing their aspirations, their fears, their choices, Carine Tardieu depicts different ways in which humans create families.

title: Hola Frida!
overview: It’s the story of a little girl who is different. Her world is Coyoacan, Mexico City. Sparkling, vibrant, everything interests her and when difficulties arise, she faces them with an overflowing imagination. This little girl is called Frida Kahlo.

title: Judge Michael - Rise of the Law
original_title: Judge Michael - Rise of the Law
overview: A new enemy has risen on mega city one, his name is Voss Kane " The Ripper " bringing chaos to the streets, now a new judge has emerged from the hall of justice teached by Dredd himself, to uphold the law and bring justice to the streets.

title: A Second Life
overview: July 26, 2024 — the day of the Olympic Games Opening Ceremony. Elisabeth, a hearing impaired young woman, is torn between depression and the pressure of managing short-term rentals in a hectic Paris. The arrival of Elijah, a radiant and carefree Californian, disrupts her fragile balance.

title: John-Luke Roberts Builds a Monster
overview: John-Luke Roberts is too anxious to leave the house, so a figment from a nightmare called “The Monarch” has to perform his show for him.  The Monarch doesn’t know how to perform a comedy show, but does it anyway.  This is that show. An anxiety dream performed live on stage; or a comedy show about anxiety.

title: Summerween
overview: On Summerween, a former circus clown escapes a mental institution to return to his abandoned mansion and hunt the teens partying there.

title: Let's Go! Anpanman: Baikinman and Lulun
original_title: それいけ！アンパンマン ばいきんまんとえほんのルルン
overview: One day, Baikinman finds a picture book, hears a voice calling for help from inside the book, and is sucked into the book, where he meets the forest fairy Lulun. Lulun, who is too scared to muster up the courage, asks her to defeat the "Sucking Elephant" that is rampaging in the forest. Although Lulun is reluctant at first, she gains courage when she sees Baikinman standing up to Suitoruzo, but she is forced to struggle against Suitoruzo's strength. In a desperate situation, Baikinman tells Lulun to call Anpanman, but...

title: Memory of a Coven
overview: A woman who feels alone in the world discovers, through an encounter with other women who claim to know her, things about herself that she did not know, and in them she achieves something that seemed impossible: a family.

title: Maksym & Milana
overview: Told through the eyes of children, the story of Maksym, a 10-year-old Ukrainian boy, who flees the war, arrives in Valencia and meets a Russian girl named Milana.

title: The Giaccomo
overview: To reach a million followers, Giaccomo will stop at nothing. From Amiens to Dubai, the dizzying rise of an influencer ready to push all boundaries to blow up the buzz.

title: Follies
overview: After 16 years together, François and Julie open their relationship to explore sexual adventures and self-discovery. With two kids and their bond at stake, the path proves more complex than expected.

title: WHO
overview: In a high-stakes world where time is scarce and every choice matters, diverse characters face a merciless system where one wrong move means death. Amid intense pressure, they confront moral quandaries and seek truth while testing limits.

title: Nino
overview: Nino is a young man on a journey to reconnect with the world and himself in the streets of Paris, following the suggestion of his doctors. In three days, he will face a major challenge.

title: Angikaaram
overview: Inspired by true events, this film follows the journey of a man who has had enough, fights for recognition against a system shaped strictly by politics and power.

title: hi, Papa
overview: A daughter revisits past "hello's" in order to learn how to say goodbye to her recently deceased father.

title: Cowgirl
overview: Empar, a 60-year-old farmer, needs her cow Tona to get pregnant to save her farm. After failed attempts, she asks Bernat, owner of the area's largest farm, for help. When Tona conceives, the vet warns of a risky pregnancy.
